task_text: Look at the sprint 14 assignments and testing log, then tell me which tasks are at risk of missing the sprint deadline. Write your assessment to sprint14_deadline_risk.txt.

input.content:
Sprint 14 Deadline Risk Assessment
Sprint window: 2026-07-07 to 2026-07-18
Assessment based on: sprint_14_task_assignments.txt and helios_testing_log_sprint14.txt
(Testing log covers through 2026-07-11)

Tasks at risk of missing the sprint deadline
--------------------------------------------

1. HEL-243 — Data ingestion: date format normalization
   Assignee: Amir Hassan | Due: 2026-07-15 | Status: Blocked
   Risk drivers:
   - Explicitly Blocked.
   - Linked open defect HEL-D-014 (HIGH): date normalization fails for MM/DD/YYYY; affects ~40% of Meridian source data.
   - Blocked pending Meridian sample data (due same day as the task: 2026-07-15), leaving little or no buffer to complete work after unblocking.
   - Same owner also has open HIGH defect HEL-D-015 (large-file memory overflow).

2. HEL-246 — UAT environment: server provisioning
   Assignee: Nadia Petrov | Due: 2026-07-16 | Status: At Risk
   Risk drivers:
   - Already flagged At Risk in the assignment board.
   - 8-point item with due date only two days after the current testing-log cutoff (2026-07-11); no evidence of progress recovery in the log.

3. HEL-247 — Performance benchmark: dashboard load
   Assignee: Derek Okafor | Due: 2026-07-18 | Status: Not Started
   Risk drivers:
   - Still Not Started with only ~1 week remaining in the sprint.
   - Related dashboard load test (TC-604) is NOT RUN.
   - Depends on dashboard work (HEL-241/HEL-242) being sufficiently complete to benchmark.

4. HEL-245 — Integration test suite: data pipeline
   Assignee: Kenji Watanabe | Due: 2026-07-18 | Status: In Progress
   Risk drivers:
   - Data pipeline suite is only 5/7 PASS with 2 OPEN high-severity failures (HEL-D-014, HEL-D-015).
   - Failures are owned by Amir Hassan and tied to blocked/under-investigation work, so suite completion is blocked on external fixes.

Additional notes (elevated watch, lower certainty of miss)
----------------------------------------------------------
- HEL-242 (chart rendering, due 2026-07-16, In Progress): TC-602 in progress, TC-603 not run — monitor for slip if chart work does not finish before due date.
- HEL-241 (data table, due 2026-07-14, In Progress): TC-601 already PASS; closer to on track but due soon after the log date.
- HEL-248 (license renewal, due 2026-07-14, In Progress): no testing-log signal; due soon — calendar/process risk only.
- HEL-244 is Done and not at risk.

Summary: Highest deadline risk is HEL-243 (Blocked + dependency), HEL-246 (explicit At Risk), HEL-247 (Not Started), and HEL-245 (blocked by open HIGH defects on the pipeline).

content.text:
Assessment written to `sprint14_deadline_risk.txt`.

**Tasks most at risk of missing the Sprint 14 deadline (ends 2026-07-18):**

1. **HEL-243** (date format normalization) — **Blocked**; tied to open HIGH defect HEL-D-014; waiting on Meridian sample data due the same day as the task.
2. **HEL-246** (UAT server provisioning) — already marked **At Risk**; 8-point item due 2026-07-16.
3. **HEL-247** (performance benchmark) — **Not Started**; related load test TC-604 not run; depends on dashboard work.
4. **HEL-245** (data pipeline integration tests) — In Progress but blocked by two open HIGH pipeline defects (HEL-D-014, HEL-D-015).

Lower-certainty watch items: HEL-242 (charts mid-test), HEL-241 and HEL-248 (due soon). HEL-244 is Done.
